subcodes.first_line: O Badí'! Upon thee be My glory and My peace. Thy meaningful letter was presented before the countenance of the Wronged One by Ḍíyá, upon him be My glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بدیع علیک بهائی و سلامی نامه بامعنی شما را ضیاء علیه بهائی امام وجه مظلوم عرض
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement
